apiErrors.geocodePath404: Could not find the geocoding route (404). Make sure the API base URL in settings is only the site origin (without /api), and that the server is deployed with /api/v1/geocode/place.
apiErrors.geocodeBadShape: Invalid response from the geocoding server.
apiErrors.geocodeBadFields: Incomplete coordinate data from the server.

mutationToasts.archiveOk: Order removed from the operational list — record kept in the database.
mutationToasts.autoDistFailed: Could not start auto distribution automatically — open the orders list and press auto distribute for this order.
mutationToasts.quickAlertFailed: Could not send quick status alert

dashboard.footerNote: Unified API client with React Query — ready to connect the mobile app later via the same hooks or createApiClient.

page.description: A quick operational snapshot for orders and alerts.

activity.title: Activity summary
activity.dispatchOnly: Activity summary is available for management and dispatch accounts.

mapSettings.title: Map settings
mapSettings.description: Coordinates and zoom are saved on the server. Country and city are used for geocoding (Nominatim) to move the map — you can also adjust the location manually on the map.
mapSettings.searchHint: Supports: country only, city only, or country + city. Search via
mapSettings.pickOnMapBody: Pan/zoom the map or click to set the center. Coordinates and zoom update automatically.

errors.enterCountryOrCity: Enter a country and/or a city, then press search.
errors.incompleteGeocodeResponse: Incomplete server response — try again or move the map manually.
errors.searchFailed: Could not search for the location.

prepaid.title: Captain prepaid balance system
prepaid.description: Deduction happens from delivery fees only after the order is delivered.
prepaid.allowCustomCommission: Allow a custom commission rate per captain
prepaid.allowManualOverride: Allow manual assignment override when balance is low

page.title: Captains
page.description: Manage accounts, activation, editing, and captain order reporting.

guidance.title: Guidance
guidance.description: Activation controls whether the captain can access the system; availability is updated from the captain app or operations dashboard.

balanceAdjustment.title: Adjust captain balance
balanceAdjustment.notePlaceholder: Write a clear reason for auditing later

errors.invalidAmount: Enter a valid amount greater than zero.

edit.title: Edit captain
edit.description: Update account, vehicle, and area details
edit.branchManagerSupervisorHint: As a branch supervisor, the captain remains linked to your account.

add.title: Add captain
add.descriptionBranchManager: Creates a captain within your branch scope and links them to the branch supervisor automatically.
add.descriptionSuperAdmin: Super admin: pick the company, then branch and zone (same company only).
add.descriptionDefault: Creates a platform user with captain role and an initial password for your company.
add.supervisorAutoBind: The captain will be linked to the branch supervisor: {{name}}.

errors.chooseBranch: Choose the branch the captain belongs to.
errors.noActiveBranch: No active branch exists for this company. Create a branch first before adding a captain.

report.title: Captain report
report.description: Orders linked to this captain (current assignment or assignment history). Filter by date, search, and area.
report.emptyDescription: Try widening the date range or removing some filters.

roster.emptyDescription: Start by adding a new captain to show up in this list.
roster.chargeError: Could not top up captain balance
roster.deleteConfirm:
Delete captain “{{name}}” and their login account permanently?
Delivered/cancelled orders will be unlinked from this captain, and assignment/location history will be removed. Cannot delete if there are in-progress orders.

page.title: Users
page.description: Platform login accounts with role-based filtering and controls.
page.superAdminOnly: General user creation is available only for SUPER_ADMIN. Current role: {{role}}.
page.filterDescription: Filter users by role. Customer accounts include optional delivery profile fields.

card.toggleHint: Changing activation is available for admins only.

addUser.title: Add user
addUser.description: Create a platform account using the simplified form (platform admin / company admin). Captains are created from the Captains page.
addUser.noCompanies: No companies yet. Click “Create new company” to add one, then select it here.

errors.password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.companyMissing: Selected company not found. Refresh the list or pick another company.

createCompany.title: Create new company
createCompany.description: Creates a company id automatically. You can then select it for a company admin from the list.

archiveSection.title: Companies — safe archive (super admin only)
archiveSection.description: Review counts, then archive the company (disable only). No hard-delete of users, orders, or ledgers.
archiveSection.empty: No companies in the active list.

errors.activeOrders: Cannot archive the company because it has unfinished orders.
errors.invalidPhrase: Confirmation phrase is incorrect. Type exactly: ARCHIVE COMPANY

archiveModal.success: Company archived (hidden from active list) without deleting any data.
archiveModal.title: Archive company
archiveModal.description: This archives (disables) the company — not a hard delete. Users, orders, and wallets are not deleted.
archiveModal.alreadyDisabledInfo: This company is already disabled (archived); details are shown for information only.

customerProfile.sectionBody: Same fields as “new order”: addresses, location link, area, preferred pricing, and optional map pin. Saved as a reference for the customer account.
customerProfile.coordsNone: No saved map coordinates — the captain can set the location from the app later.
customerProfile.linkHelp: Paste a share link from Google Maps or any https link that shows the drop-off; it is saved for the captain with the order when used.
customerProfile.mapNoneTitle: No location selected on the map
customerProfile.mapNoneBody: The captain can confirm/adjust drop-off in the captain app when needed. To pin a location now, enable the option below.
customerProfile.mapToggleTitle: Add drop-off location on the map (optional)
customerProfile.mapToggleBody: When enabled, click the map to pin the drop-off and save coordinates with the customer profile.
customerProfile.mapHint: Click the map to pin the drop-off.

errors.linkScheme: Link must start with http or https.
errors.linkInvalid: Invalid URL — paste the full link.
errors.amount: Order price must be a positive number.
errors.delivery: Delivery fee must be a positive number.
errors.mapRequired: Map option enabled — click the map to select drop-off coordinates.

page.title: Stores
page.description: Store subscription, linked supervisor, and primary region as provided by the server.
page.emptyDescription: Refresh or check role/scope settings if needed.

modal.title: Update store subscription
modal.branchManagerAutoLinkHint: As a branch supervisor, the store will be linked to your account automatically when SUPERVISOR_LINKED is selected.

page.title: Order distribution board
page.description: Live management of captains and orders on the map.

manualAssign.noCompatibleCaptains: No captains on this page match the store supervisor for this order.

guard.companyAdminOutOfScope: This captain is outside the allowed distribution scope for this order.
guard.supervisorOutOfScope: This captain is outside the store supervisor scope for this order.
guard.reassignOutOfScope: This captain is outside the allowed distribution scope for this order (or pick a compatible captain from the list).

auto.hint: Assigns all visible orders to suitable captains

quickDrop.legendIntro: Card colors reflect the captain’s map state. Under the name:
quickDrop.legendWaitingNote: means an offer needs a response, and
quickDrop.boxWaitingTitle: ASSIGNED offers — waiting for the captain to accept/decline

quickAlert.fetchCaptainFailed: Could not load captain data to send the alert
quickAlert.missingCaptainAccount: Could not resolve the captain account to send the alert. Make sure the server is up to date and GET /api/v1/captains works.
quickAlert.sent: Alert sent — it will show in the captain app notifications

mapUi.title: Captains map
mapUi.hintWhileDragging: Drop the order on a captain icon to assign (drag & drop).
mapUi.hintIdle: The pulsing yellow frame is the captain who currently has an offer; it moves automatically after a decline or when the offer expires. Drag an order card to assign manually.
mapUi.autoFollow: Auto follow (move camera with live data)

offerCountdown.title: Seconds left on the offer accept/decline deadline (server-synchronized; matches captain + map)
offerCountdown.label: Offer

google.disabledBody: Add a Google Maps key in VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY to enable real tracking. When enabled, the map is restricted to Israel only.
google.scriptLoadFailed: Google Maps script failed to load.
google.authFailed: Google Maps JavaScript API authentication failed.
google.loadFailedBody: Check the key, enable Maps JavaScript API, billing, and referrer restrictions.

draggable.titleDragToMap: Drag to assign on the map
draggable.queueTitle: Queue position in distribution list — ref: {{number}}
draggable.autoReassignNote: Auto distribution: on decline or when the offer expires, the order moves to another available captain automatically.

page.title: Finance
page.descriptionSuperAdmin: View wallet balances and ledger activity. Top up a store or supervisor from the tools above, or top up a company wallet from the “Company wallet” tab.
page.descriptionCompanyAdmin: View your company wallet balance (read-only), captain wallet, and top up captain prepaid when needed — store management is not done here.
page.descriptionDefault: View wallet balances and ledger activity.

tools.superAdminDescription: Top up a store wallet or add/deduct supervisor wallet balance (branch manager/dispatcher) — POST with Idempotency-Key.
tools.companyAdminDescription: Top up captain prepaid within your company only. Amount + reason are required; idempotency is generated automatically. No company wallet top-up here.

balance.title: Balance
balance.subtitleSupervisor: Supervisor account linked to your company user.
balance.companyAdminScopeNote: Only your linked company wallet is shown. You cannot select another company here.

errors.tenantScope: No company scope on your account (TENANT_SCOPE_REQUIRED). Contact administration.
errors.forbidden: Not allowed to view wallet balance.

balance.noRecentMovements: No movements recorded yet in the latest batch shown.

balanceCard.existsNote: Shows the cached balance as stored on the server.
balanceCard.missingNote: Wallet not created yet — shows zero until the first movement.

transfer.cardDescription: Transfer from your supervisor wallet to a captain you supervise. Available for branch managers and dispatchers only.

ledger.title: Ledger activity
ledger.companyNote: For the company wallet, the latest movements are shown with the balance card above. Full paging may require additional server support later.
ledger.genericDescriptionEnabled: Newest first. Loading more fetches the next batch.
ledger.genericDescriptionDisabled: No wallet id yet — ledger is not requested.
ledger.emptyStateDescription: After the wallet is created and ids appear, movements can be shown here.

ledgerReport.title: Wallet ledger report (by range)
ledgerReport.descriptionServerUtc: Ledger movements within a time range. The range is sent to the server as UTC (ISO-8601).
ledgerReport.descriptionNoWallet: Create the first movement or wait for wallet creation to enable the report.
ledgerReport.descriptionAlt: Ledger movements within the server range (UTC). Default: last 7 days. Field times follow your browser locale.

errors.order: "From" must be before "To", and the range cannot exceed 90 days.

common.idempotencyNotReady: Idempotency key is not ready. Close the modal and open it again.
common.positiveAmount: Enter a positive amount (up to 2 decimals).

errors.tenantScope: No company scope on your account (TENANT_SCOPE_REQUIRED). Contact administration to link the account to a company.
errors.captainOutOfCompany: Not allowed: captain is not in your company.

companyAdminCaptainPrepaid.title: Top up captain prepaid (company admin)
companyAdminCaptainPrepaid.description: Uses `POST /finance/captains/.../prepaid-charge` — idempotency is generated when the modal opens. Company scope comes from the session only.
companyAdminCaptainPrepaid.successNoop: No new change (duplicate request with the same idempotency).
companyAdminCaptainPrepaid.success: Top-up recorded and prepaid balance updated.
companyAdminCaptainPrepaid.reasonPlaceholder: Shown in the prepaid transaction log

errors.tenantScope: No company scope on your account (TENANT_SCOPE_REQUIRED). Contact administration to link the account to a company.
errors.storeNotAllowed: Not allowed: store is not in your company or you lack permission.

companyAdminStoreTopup.title: Top up store wallet (company admin)
companyAdminStoreTopup.description: Automatically sends an idempotency key when the modal opens. Company scope is taken from the login session — company id is not sent in the request body.

superAdminCompanyTopup.pickCompany: Choose a company from the tab first.
superAdminCompanyTopup.title: Top up company wallet
superAdminCompanyTopup.description: Super admin only. An idempotency key is generated automatically when the modal opens and is sent in the request body.
superAdminCompanyTopup.successNoop: Completed (safe duplicate — same idempotency key in the body).
superAdminCompanyTopup.noCompanySelected: No company selected — close and pick a company from the tab first.

superAdminStoreTopup.title: Top up store wallet
superAdminStoreTopup.description: Super admin only. Sends an idempotency key automatically when the modal opens.

superAdminSupervisorTopup.pickUser: Pick a user (branch manager or dispatcher).
superAdminSupervisorTopup.title: Adjust supervisor balance
superAdminSupervisorTopup.description: Super admin — add or deduct supervisor wallet balance with a mandatory reason.
superAdminSupervisorTopup.noUsersHint: No users with these roles in the current page (increase page size later if needed).
superAdminSupervisorTopup.decimalsServerCurrencyHint: Up to 2 decimal places. No currency selection — server default applies.

supervisorCaptainTransfer.pickCaptain: Choose a captain linked to you as supervisor.
supervisorCaptainTransfer.title: Transfer to captain
supervisorCaptainTransfer.description: Supervisor only. Listed captains are those linked to you in the system. Idempotency is generated when the modal opens.
supervisorCaptainTransfer.noCaptainsHint: No captains linked to your supervisor account — or adjust list scope later.
supervisorCaptainTransfer.currencyHint: No currency selection. Requires company scope and sufficient balance.

login.subtitle: Sign in to the operations dashboard

page.title: Orders
page.description: Search and filter, manual assignment, and redistribution for authorized roles.

list.filterDesc: Order number or customer phone, and by status
list.emptyDesc: Try changing search or status to see results.
list.adminModalDesc: Changes order status directly (supervisors only). Choosing pending distribution, preparing, or cancelled clears the assigned captain and pending distribution offers. Not a substitute for normal distribution flows.
list.archiveDesc: The row is not deleted from the database — it is hidden from operational lists and default statistics (including after delivery). Customer-linked orders remain in the customer record. Display can be restored later via admin (unarchive).

detailModal.title: Order details
detailModal.emptyDesc: The order may be unavailable or the list was refreshed.

page.title: New order
page.description: Enter customer details and addresses. Map pin is optional; if not set, the captain can confirm the location in the app later.
page.descriptionCompany: Customer data, pickup point, drop-off details, and amounts. Map is optional; if you do not pin a location here, the captain can confirm it later.

form.locationLinkHelp: Paste a share link from Google Maps or any https link that shows the drop-off; it is saved in notes for the captain.
form.deliveryFeeHelp: Use 0 for free delivery. Customer cash collection is calculated on the server ({{amountLabel}} + fee).
form.mapNoneTitle: No location selected on the map
form.mapNoneBody: The captain can confirm or adjust the drop-off in the captain app when the order is received. To pin a location now, enable the option below.
form.mapToggleTitle: Add drop-off location on the map (optional)
form.mapToggleBody: When enabled, click the map to pin the drop-off and send coordinates with the order.
form.mapHint: Click the map to pin the drop-off (6 decimal precision).

errors.amount: Store amount must be greater than zero.
errors.amountCompany: Order amount must be greater than zero.
errors.deliveryFee: Delivery fee must be zero or a positive number.
errors.mapRequired: Map option enabled — click the map to select drop-off coordinates.
errors.linkScheme: Link must start with http or https.
errors.linkInvalid: Invalid URL — paste the full link.

notesLine.noMap: [No map coordinates — captain can confirm drop-off in the app when needed]

page.title: Incubator host
page.description: Paste text, parse, review the preview, then create. Creates a normal (AUTO) order and runs the same auto distribution as the orders list.

preview.title: Order preview
preview.description: Required: customer name, phone, pickup and drop-off address, area, price. After creation, auto distribution runs so the order follows the usual captain flow.

incubator.allRequiredOk: All required fields are complete — you can create the order.

validation.amountPositive: Must be a number greater than zero.

log.emptyInput: Input is empty — nothing to parse.
log.unknownLabel: Line {{line}}: unknown label «{{rawLabel}}» — no matching field.
log.appendedUnknown: → value appended to current field «{{field}}» (unknown label).
log.lineMalformedLabeled: Line {{line}}: looks like a field but label/value was not parsed validly: {{snippet}}
log.lineUnlabeled: Line {{line}}: text with no label and no previous field — skipped: {{snippet}}
log.phoneNormalizeFailed: Could not normalize phone number — check the extracted value.
log.totalParseFailed: Could not parse amount from «{{field}}» — check the extracted value.
log.summaryAllFilled: Summary: all known fields have values.

reports.pageDesc: Wallet ledger vs captain prepaid book, prepaid movements, and delivered commissions from ledger records.
reports.rangeCardDesc: Applies to all three sections. Sent to the server as UTC. Default is last 7 days.
reports.reconDesc: Compare wallet delivery-deduction lines with prepaid deductions, and prepaid charge/adjust lines with ledger lines.
reports.reconStatOrphanLedger: Charge/adjust ledger lines without CBT (in range)
reports.noCaptains: No captains to show or insufficient list permission.
reports.deliveredDesc: `ORDER_DELIVERED_CAPTAIN_DEDUCTION` lines for orders delivered in the range. “Delivery fee” shows actual (or inferred for legacy) fee. “Commission” is what was posted at delivery time; legacy rows may differ from recomputing today.
reports.historyDesc: Filter orders by creation time (`orders.created_at`) within the UTC range — not delivery time. Table, totals, and CSV use the same filters. Pickup and delivery times come from `picked_up_at` and `delivered_at`; when missing, pickup shows “Not recorded” and delivery shows “—” if not delivered.

public.loadError: Could not load the request page.
public.successDesc: Thank you. A manager will follow up on your request.
public.previewCollect: Customer Collection Amount (preview): {{amount}} ₪ (= Store Amount + Delivery Fee). The server computes the final total; do not enter a separate customer total here.
public.summaryNote: Totals are also computed on the server as cash_collection = store amount + delivery fee.

manualAssign.title: Manual assign
manualAssign.reassignDescription: Move order {{order}} to another captain with logged reassignment.
